Back to Recipes

Pasta con Pesto

Ingredients

  • 500g Pasta
  • 275 Tofu (drained)
  • Cherry Tomatoes
  • 4 Avocados
  • 20g Basil
  • 250g Spinach (frozen)
  • 100g Cashews
  • 1 Tsp Nutritional Yeast
  • 1 Tbsp Salt
  • 1 Garlic Clove
  • Lemon Juice
  • Agua (si hace falta)

Instructions

  1. Fry tofu and cook pasta.
  2. Add oil, avocados, basil, spinach, cashews and lemon juice into a blender and process.
